svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="dev/prod 配置分流" id="flywayEnvsplit"> <mxGraphModel dx="-484" dy="-108" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="920" pageHeight="400" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="同一开关，dev 与 prod 取舍相反：dev 让开发顺，prod 让生产稳" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="540" x="190" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DEV_H" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="dev / 本地" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="360" x="60" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="validate-on-migrate: false" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="340" x="80" y="104" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="out-of-order: true（号段并行开发不被卡）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="340" x="80" y="128" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="h2local: enabled: false（纯内存跑单测）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="340" x="80" y="152" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D4" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="gap = 常态 → out-of-order 乱序补跑" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="340" x="80" y="184" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PROD_H" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="prod（生产）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="360" x="500" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="validate-on-migrate: ${SPRING_FLYWAY_VALIDATE_ON_MIGRATE:true}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="340" x="520" y="104" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="out-of-order: true" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="340" x="520" y="128" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="continue-on-gap-failure: 降级告警（不卡死启动）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="340" x="520" y="152" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P4" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="repair-before-migrate: true（开机自愈）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="340" x="520" y="176" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P5" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="gap = 隐患 → 告警 + 维护窗口补跑" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="340" x="520" y="208" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DIV" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="460" y="56" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="460" y="240" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VS" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="同一开关
取舍相反" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="80" x="420" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FOOT" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="一刀切要么天天卡开发、要么生产裸奔 —— 环境分得越细，每个环境才能配得越贴" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="680" x="120" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
